title: Rudy
content:
Rudy
 is the young master of the 
Purple Dao Sect
.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Personality

3

Background

4

History

Appearance
[
]

He is a slightly handsome man but he has a evil look to him. As the name of his sect suggests, he wears purple clothing.

Personality
[
]

He has a wicked personality as he is willing to use 
Lu Yanfei
 as a cultivation furnace and kill her right after he has stolen her cultivation.

Background
[
]

In the past, he attempted to strong-arm Lu Yanfei into a becoming his cultivation partner. However, his true intentions were to use her as a cultivation furnace.

He went as far as storming the 
Origin Sect
 to kidnap her but he and his attendant, 
Song Wude
, were kicked out by the previous Ancestor of the Origin Sect.

History
[
]

He had Song Wude attack the Origin Sect after hearing the news of its Old Ancestor passing away only to end up offending 
Wang Lin
 and dying a meaningless death.
